description: 敏感 Token — JWT、OAuth、Session、SSH Key — Hard Positive
generation_guidelines: Generate realistic security tokens. Cover: JWT (header.payload.signature format), OAuth2 access_token/refresh_token, GitHub personal access tokens (ghp_), GitLab tokens (glpat-), session tokens, RSA/SSH private key fragments. Tokens should look authentic in format and length. Paths indicate auth contexts: root.auth.jwt, root.api.oauth2, root.security.ssh.

examples.text: Path: root.api.auth | Key: access_token | Struct: Leaf | Val: "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIiwibmFtZSI6IkpvaG4gRG9lIiwiYWRtaW4iOnRydWUsImlhdCI6MTUxNjIzOTAyMn0.TJa8YVLfO4W6KzKs0RqZ-c4gK0YrM0kCI8U2R0qTJX0"
Path: root.config.github | Key: personal_token | Struct: Leaf | Val: "ghp_v9L3p0K1mN2bV5c8X7z4A1q9W0e3R2t1Y4u5"
